page: Amazon Web Services g7.48xlarge is a graphics-intensive server instance powered by the AWS Nitro hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture with 192 dedicated physical Intel CPU cores operating at a clock speed of 3.9 GHz. The system is configured with 768.0 GB of system memory, providing a ratio of 4.0 GB of RAM per CPU core.

For hardware-accelerated workloads, the instance is equipped with eight NVIDIA RTX PRO 4500 GPUs, delivering a combined total of 256 GB of video memory. Local storage consists of 7600 GB of NVMe SSD capacity, offering high-speed local data access.

Networking capabilities include a baseline bandwidth of 350 Gbps. From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the high density of dedicated physical cores, massive GPU count, and large local NVMe storage represent a premium hardware class designed for resource-intensive operations. This configuration is engineered for workloads such as graphics rendering, machine learning inference, data science jobs, and high-throughput compute tasks.
description: Amazon Web Services g7.48xlarge is a high-density, graphics-intensive server instance built on the AWS Nitro hypervisor. It features 192 dedicated physical Intel x86_64 CPU cores running at 3.9 GHz, paired with 768.0 GB of system memory. For acceleration, the instance integrates eight NVIDIA RTX PRO 4500 GPUs with a total of 256 GB of VRAM. Local storage is provided via 7600 GB of NVMe SSDs, and network connectivity features a baseline bandwidth of 350 Gbps. This hardware profile is optimized for demanding workloads including graphics rendering, machine learning, and high-performance computing.
og_description: Amazon Web Services g7.48xlarge is a graphics-intensive server featuring 192 dedicated Intel CPU cores, eight NVIDIA RTX PRO 4500 GPUs with 256 GB VRAM, 768 GB RAM, and 7600 GB of local NVMe SSD storage.
meta_description: Amazon Web Services g7.48xlarge features 192 Intel cores, eight NVIDIA RTX PRO 4500 GPUs, 768 GB RAM, and 7600 GB NVMe SSD storage.
tagline: An accelerated server featuring eight dedicated GPUs, high-speed NVMe storage, and 192 physical CPU cores for intensive graphics and compute workloads.
bullet_points: 192 dedicated physical Intel CPU cores running at 3.9 GHz
Eight NVIDIA RTX PRO 4500 GPUs with 256 GB total VRAM
768.0 GB of system memory and 7600 GB of local NVMe SSD storage
High-speed networking with 350 Gbps baseline bandwidth
Designed for graphics rendering, machine learning, and compute-heavy workloads
